name: Airspace Closure Monitor
description: Airspace Closure Monitor widget from World Conflicts OSINT template
author: Infinite Monitor

widget.title: Airspace Closure Monitor

files.src/data/notams.ts:
import { NotamEntry, NotamType, NotamSeverity, Region, CONFLICT_ZONES } from '../types';

const now = new Date();
const h = (hours: number) => new Date(now.getTime() - hours * 3600000).toISOString();
const f = (hours: number) => new Date(now.getTime() + hours * 3600000).toISOString();

let _id = 0;
const mkId = () => `NOTAM-${++_id}`;

function mkNotam(
  overrides: Partial<NotamEntry> & {
    notamId: string; type: NotamType; severity: NotamSeverity;
    location: string; fir: string; country: string; region: Region;
    lat: number; lng: number; radius: number;
    lowerAlt: string; upperAlt: string;
    effectiveFrom: string; effectiveTo: string; issuedAt: string;
    description: string; keywords: string[];
  }
): NotamEntry {
  const isConflictZone = CONFLICT_ZONES.some(z => overrides.country?.includes(z) || overrides.location?.includes(z));
  const issuedTime = new Date(overrides.issuedAt).getTime();
  const isNew = (now.getTime() - issuedTime) < 6 * 3600000;

  const rawLines = [
    `${overrides.notamId} NOTAMN`,
    `Q) ${overrides.fir}/QRTCA/IV/BO/W/${overrides.lowerAlt.replace(/\s/g,'')}/${overrides.upperAlt.replace(/\s/g,'')}`,
    `A) ${overrides.fir}`,
    `B) ${overrides.effectiveFrom.replace(/[-T:]/g,'').slice(0,12)}`,
    `C) ${overrides.effectiveTo.replace(/[-T:]/g,'').slice(0,12)}`,
    `E) ${overrides.description}`,
  ];

  return {
    id: mkId(),
    rawText: rawLines.join('\n'),
    isConflictZone,
    isNew,
    ...overrides,
  };
}

export function generateNotams(): NotamEntry[] {
  return [
    // ═══ CONFLICT ZONES (country-level) ═══
    mkNotam({
      notamId: 'A0147/26', type: 'CONFLICT', severity: 'critical',

      lat: 48.38, lng: 37.62, radius: 120,
      countryId: '804',
      lowerAlt: 'SFC', upperAlt: 'UNL',
      effectiveFrom: h(720), effectiveTo: f(2160),
      issuedAt: h(2), description: 'AIRSPACE PROHIBITED. ALL AIRCRAFT OPERATIONS PROHIBITED WITHIN EASTERN UKRAINE FIR DUE TO ONGOING ARMED CONFLICT. ANTI-AIRCRAFT SYSTEMS ACTIVE. EXTREME DANGER TO CIVIL AVIATION.',
